title: What did the USWNT learn ahead of World Cup after Japan series?
summary: The USWNT completed a three-match friendly series against Japan as World Cup preparation under coach Emma Hayes. The matches provided tactical insights and competitive testing for the squad ahead of the tournament.
content: The USWNT just wrapped their window of three friendly games against Japan, but what did Emma Hayes learn ahead of the World Cup?

zh.title: 美国女足在与日本系列赛后在世界杯前学到了什么？

title: £111 train tickets will have 'chilling effect' on World Cup - Fifa
summary: FIFA defended inflated train fares at the 2026 World Cup against criticism from New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill, warning that £111 tickets will dampen attendance. The dispute centers on accessibility and fan experience at the tournament.
content: Fifa hits back at criticism from New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill, saying vastly inflated train fares at the 2026 World Cup will have a "chilling effect".

zh.title: 111英镑火车票将对世界杯产生"冷却效应"- 国际足联

title: Transfer rumors, news: Liverpool eye Wharton amid Man United, Real Madrid interest
summary: Liverpool, Manchester United, and Real Madrid are competing to sign Crystal Palace midfielder Adam Wharton. The transfer interest reflects the player's prominence among Europe's elite clubs.

title: Slot: Liverpool's UCL exit could help league form
summary: Liverpool manager Arne Slot suggests the club's Champions League exit could improve their league form and focus on securing European qualification next season. Reduced fixture congestion may help the team's domestic campaign.
content: Arne Slot said Liverpool's exit from the Champions League could help them in their quest to qualify for the competition again next season.

title: From New Jersey to Copa del Rey? Matarazzo reaching new heights for U.S. coaches
summary: Pellegrino Matarazzo could become the first U.S.-born coach to win a trophy in Europe's top five leagues if Real Sociedad wins Saturday's Copa del Rey final. The achievement would mark a historic milestone for American managers in elite European football.
content: If Real Sociedad win Saturday's Copa del Rey final, Pellegrino Matarazzo will be the first U.S.-born coach to win a trophy in one of Europe's top five leagues. It has been quite a journey.

title: Head coach Hourihane to leave Barnsley
summary: Barnsley head coach Conor Hourihane will depart the club at season's end by mutual agreement. The separation concludes his tenure with the Championship side.
